summary: Normalized deleted qd changed-file evidence and tightened qd report validation so completion changedFiles[] distinguishes existing repo paths from explicit deleted-file markers.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: reports/qd/m4-merge-group-trigger-dedupe/completion.json marks the deleted workflow path explicitly as deleted:.github/workflows/merge-queue.yml
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The historical completion report now lists deleted:.github/workflows/merge-queue.yml in changedFiles[].

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects plain changedFiles[] paths that do not exist in the checkout.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-changed-file-contract/commands.log records a temporary-copy negative smoke test where a plain missing changedFiles path failed as expected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh accepts deleted:<repo-relative-path> only when the referenced path does not exist and the marker has a non-empty repo-relative path.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh validates deleted: entries for non-empty repo-relative paths, rejects absolute and '..' traversal paths, and reports an error if the referenced path exists.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd reports pass the stricter check.
Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, just check, and a negative smoke test for a missing plain changed file.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-changed-file-contract/commands.log records the required validation commands and smoke test. The repository check gate passed through the Nix toolchain with nix develop -c just check.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false because this is repository qd report metadata validation only.

commandsRun.command: temporary-copy plain missing changedFiles negative smoke test

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd report metadata validation only; Linux validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
